title: Clinical Research Coordinator
description: Intermountain Health, a leading integrated healthcare system, seeks a Clinical Research Coordinator to manage studies across our Seattle hospitals and clinics. You'll recruit participants, manage protocols, ensure regulatory compliance, and advance patient-centered research. This meaningful role offers the opportunity to contribute to medical breakthroughs while supporting clinical excellence.
responsibilities: Coordinate day-to-day operations of clinical research studies
Recruit and screen study participants meeting protocol criteria
Obtain informed consent and manage participant documentation
Monitor protocol compliance and ensure regulatory adherence
Maintain study-specific databases and quality assurance records
Communicate regularly with principal investigators and study teams

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in healthcare, life sciences, or related field
skills: Clinical research knowledge and GCP compliance
Attention to detail and data management
certifications: CITI certification or GCP training (can be obtained on the job)

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and wellness benefits
Paid time off and shift flexibility
